login.validation_code_title: You have activated the two-factor authentication on your account. Please enter a validation code generated by the phone app you have configured.

search_help.title: Search help
search_help.contents_hint: Search matches the full contents of your documents — including text extracted from PDFs and images by OCR — not just their titles.
search_help.operators_intro: Type a word to search everywhere, or refine with these operators:
search_help.op_tag: Documents with this tag (and its sub-tags)
search_help.op_after: Created on or after this date (year, year-month, or full date)
search_help.op_before: Created on or before this date
search_help.op_uafter: Updated on or after this date
search_help.op_ubefore: Updated on or before this date
search_help.op_at: Created exactly on this date, month, or year
search_help.op_uat: Updated exactly on this date, month, or year
search_help.op_title: With this word in the title

view.delete_comment_message: Do you really want to delete this comment?
view.no_comments: No comments on this document yet

security.enable_totp_message: Make sure you have a TOTP-compatible application on your phone ready to add a new account
security.title: Two-factor authentication
security.message_1:
Two-factor authentication allows you to add a layer of security on your {appName} account.
Before activating this feature, make sure you have a TOTP-compatible app on your phone:
security.message_google_authenticator: For Android, iOS, and Blackberry: Google Authenticator
security.message_duo_mobile: For Android and iOS: Duo Mobile
security.message_2:
Those applications automatically generate a validation code that changes after a certain period of time.
You will be required to enter this validation code each time you login on {appName}.
security.secret_key_warning: Configure your TOTP app on your phone with this secret key now, you will not be able to access it later.
security.totp_enabled_message:
Two-factor authentication is enabled on your account.
Each time you login on {appName}, you will be asked for a validation code from your configured phone app.
If you lose your phone, you will not be able to login into your account but active sessions will allow you to regenerate a secrey key.

disable_totp.message: Your account will not be protected by the two-factor authentication anymore.

security.test_totp: Please enter the validation code displayed on your phone :
security.test_code_fail: This code is not valid, please double check that your phone is properly configured or disable Two-factor authentication

inbox.title: Inbox scanning
inbox.message:
By enabling this feature, the system will scan the specified inbox every minute for unread emails and automatically import them.
After importing an email, it will be marked as read.
Configuration settings for Gmail, Outlook.com, Yahoo.
inbox.test_success: The connection to the inbox is successful ({count} unread message)
inbox.test_fail: An error occurred while connecting to the inbox, please check the parameters
inbox.autoTagsEnabled: Automatically add tags from subject line marked with #
inbox.deleteImported: Delete message from mailbox after import

session.title: Opened sessions
session.clear_message: All other devices connected to this account will be disconnected

ui.title: Title
ui.drag_or_choose: Drag files here or click Choose to add
ui.drag_or_choose_upload: Drag files here or click Choose to upload
ui.files_upload_hint: {count} file(s) will be uploaded on save.
ui.import_eml_hint: Create a document from an email (.eml) file.
ui.no_files: No files attached to this document

versions.title: Version history
versions.read_only_hint: Previous versions are kept automatically. Uploading a replacement creates a new version; history is read-only.
versions.empty: This file has no previous versions.

ui.delete_document_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this document?
ui.document_saved_files_failed: Document saved, but some files could not be uploaded. Retry to upload the remaining files.
ui.empty_trash_confirm: This will permanently delete all documents in the trash. This action cannot be undone.
ui.permanently_delete_confirm: Permanently delete "{title}"? This action cannot be undone.

permissions.direct_hint: Users and groups with explicit access to this document.
permissions.no_direct: No direct permissions set. Only the owner has access.
permissions.inherited_hint: These permissions are inherited from the tags applied to this document and cannot be changed here.

share.title: Share links
share.hint: Anyone with a share link can view this document without signing in.
share.revoke_confirm: Revoke the share link "{name}"? Anyone using it will lose access.

view.not_found: This shared document is no longer available.

tags_page.title: Tags
tags_page.subtitle: Organize documents with tags. Click a tag to edit its name, color, or parent.
tags_page.no_tags: No tags yet. Create one above.

tag_edit.title: Edit tag
tag_edit.name: Name
tag_edit.delete_confirm: Delete tag "{name}"? Documents will not be deleted.

account.title: User account
account.password_min_length: New password must be at least 8 characters

sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.description: Devices and browsers currently signed in to your account.
sessions.revoke_confirm: This signs out every other session except the one you are using now. Continue?
sessions.revoke_failed: Failed to sign out other sessions

default_password_banner.title: Default admin password in use
default_password_banner.message: This administrator account still uses the built-in default password. Change it now to secure your instance.

password_reset.password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters
password_reset.password_changed: Password changed. You can now sign in.
password_reset.link_expired: This reset link has expired or is invalid. Please request a new one.
password_reset.failed: Failed to reset password. Please try again.

forgot_password.title: Reset password
forgot_password.message: Enter your username to receive a password reset link by email.
forgot_password.sent: If this username exists, a password reset email has been sent.

users.title: Users
users.delete_confirm: Delete user "{username}"? This cannot be undone.
users.disable_totp_message: Disable two-factor authentication for this user? Use this to recover a user locked out of their authenticator.

groups.title: Groups
groups.name: Name
groups.name_taken: A group with this name already exists
groups.delete_confirm: Delete group "{name}"? This cannot be undone.

apikeys.title: API Keys
apikeys.description: Create keys to access the Teedy API programmatically.
apikeys.name: Name
apikeys.copy_warning: Copy this key now. It will not be shown again.
apikeys.delete_confirm: Delete "{name}"? Any integrations using this key will stop working.

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.description: Receive HTTP POST notifications when document lifecycle events occur.

metadata.title: Custom metadata
metadata.description: Define custom fields to attach structured data to documents.
metadata.name: Name
metadata.type_immutable_hint: The type cannot be changed after the field is created.
metadata.delete_confirm: Delete the field "{name}"? Its values on all documents will be removed.

workflow_admin.title: Workflows
workflow_admin.description: Define reusable approval workflows (route models) that can be applied to documents.
workflow_admin.name: Name
workflow_admin.incomplete_tooltip: A step target (user or group) no longer exists. Edit the workflow to fix it.
workflow_admin.error_no_steps: At least one step is required

monitoring.title: Monitoring
monitoring.description: Browse the server's in-memory application log.
monitoring.no_logs: No log entries match these filters

config.title: Configuration
config.ocr_hint: When enabled, Teedy uses Tesseract to extract text from images and scanned PDFs. The document's language setting determines which OCR model is used.
config.maintenance_hint: Rebuild the search index from the database. Use this if documents are missing from search results after a migration or configuration change.
config.rebuild_confirm: This will destroy and rebuild the entire search index. Documents will be temporarily unsearchable. Continue?
config.clean_storage_hint: Delete files on disk that no longer belong to any document, and remove orphaned database records. Run this to reclaim space after unexpected shutdowns or manual file changes.
config.clean_storage_confirm: This will permanently delete orphaned files from disk and clean up the database. Documents and their files are not affected. Continue?

smtp.title: Email (SMTP)
smtp.hint: The outgoing mail server used for password-reset emails and notifications. Fields set through DOCS_SMTP_* environment variables are managed outside this form and shown disabled here.
smtp.password_keep: Leave blank to keep the current password

inbox.title: Inbox scanning
inbox.description: Periodically scan an IMAP mailbox and import each message as a new document. Attachments are added as files; the message subject becomes the document title.
inbox.password_keep: Leave blank to keep the current password
inbox.folder_hint: The mailbox folder to scan, for example INBOX.
inbox.tag_hint: Optional. Every imported document is given this tag.
inbox.auto_tags_hint: Apply tags written in the message body, prefixed with #.
inbox.delete_imported_hint: Remove each message from the mailbox once it has been imported.
inbox.test_failed: Connection test failed. Check the settings and try again.

ldap.title: LDAP authentication
ldap.description: When enabled, users can sign in with their LDAP directory credentials. An account is created automatically on first login. Local accounts continue to work.
ldap.filter_hint: Must contain the literal USERNAME placeholder, which is replaced with the login name at sign-in.
ldap.default_email_hint: Appended to the username when the directory has no email address.
ldap.default_storage_hint: Storage quota for auto-created accounts (about {mb} MB).
ldap.admin_password_keep: A password is set — leave blank to keep it.

tag_rules.title: Auto-tagging rules
tag_rules.description: Auto-tagging rules automatically apply tags to documents when their title, filename, or extracted content matches a regex pattern.

ui.processing_tooltip: OCR / text extraction is running for this file
ui.text_hint: Text extracted from each file via OCR or direct text parsing. This is what powers full-text search.
ui.no_text_hint: No text was extracted from this file. Check that the document language matches the file content and try reprocessing.

highlights.retirements: Retired the legacy workflow/routes and vocabulary features to slim down the app.
highlights.ldap: LDAP authentication is back — reinstated and hardened, with a dedicated admin settings page.
highlights.bulk_ops: Bulk document actions: tag, delete, and export multiple documents at once.
highlights.capture: Capture documents straight from your device camera.
highlights.new_ui: New surfaces: comments, groups, sharing, custom metadata, and file version history.

ui.sso_failed: Single sign-on failed. You can try again or sign in with a local account.

bulk.delete_confirm: Delete {count} document(s)? They will be moved to the trash.
